verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a total consensus among all agents (all four active agents selected Japan). Consequently, it correctly terminated the process without initiating any debates, adhering to the efficiency and logic of the pipeline.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the unanimous agreement from the four active agents. It appropriately prioritized the strong architectural (Kawara tiles) and botanical (Niwaki) evidence to confirm the location as Japan, aligning perfectly with the ground truth.
